items.title: Crypto Is Finally Growing Up, Says VC Giant Andreessen Horowitz
items.description: Andreessen Horowiz's State of Crypto 2025 crypto report highlights Bitcoin dominance, stablecoin demand, institutional adoption, and more.

items.title: Wells Fargo sees Visa and Mastercard at the forefront of payments innovation
items.description: Investing.com -- Wells Fargo initiated coverage on 20 companies in the Payments, Processors & IT Services sector, highlighting Visa and Mastercard as key beneficiaries of structural trends in digital commerce. Both companies got Overweight ratings for their scale, profitability, and exposure to long-term growth themes.

items.title: KeyBanc selective on big fintechs, sees upside at Visa, Mastercard
items.description: Investing.com --KeyBanc Capital Markets says the fintech sector is stabilizing after a deep valuation reset but requires selectivity as companies move through strategic overhauls.

items.title: Visa Live Takes Flight with Benson Boone at the Rocket Garden
items.description: SAN FRANCISCO, October 22, 2025--Prepare for lift-off this November as Visa presents another unforgettable cultural moment with Visa Live at the Rocket Garden featuring global chart-topping sensation, Benson Boone on November 29.
